allow: PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\klins\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-klins-Documents-github-sdd-nonggof-fastapi-v1\\e0361fe0-2b02-4331-a6a2-c56f5babacf7\\tool-results\\bd13ljz0e.txt"; $chunks = $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^data: \\{"type": "ai_chunk"' }; Write-Output "Total ai_chunk events: $\($chunks.Count\)"; $full = ""; foreach \($l in $chunks\) { $j = $l.Substring\(6\) | ConvertFrom-Json; $full += $j.content }; Write-Output "---FULL RECONSTRUCTED MESSAGE---"; Write-Output $full; Write-Output "---STREAM END EVENTS---"; $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match 'stream_end|end_of_ai|error' } | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell(Write-Output "1. Is Ollama API responding?"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "   YES - status $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "   NO - $_" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "2. Current shell OLLAMA_HOST:"; if \($env:OLLAMA_HOST\) { Write-Output "   $env:OLLAMA_HOST" } else { Write-Output "   \(not set\)" })

PowerShell($cases = @\("0.0.0.0", "0.0.0.0:11434", "localhost", "localhost:11434", "http://localhost:11434", "http://127.0.0.1:11434"\); foreach \($c in $cases\) { $env:OLLAMA_HOST = $c; $out = & "C:\\Users\\klins\\anaconda3\\envs\\nonggof\\python.exe" -c "from app.core.config import get_settings, Settings; Settings.model_config['env_file']=None; from app.core.config import get_settings; get_settings.cache_clear\(\); s = get_settings\(\); print\(s.OLLAMA_HOST\)" 2>&1; Write-Output \("{0,-32} -> {1}" -f $c, $out\) })

PowerShell($env:PYTHONPATH = \(Get-Location\).Path; foreach \($c in @\("0.0.0.0", "0.0.0.0:11434", "localhost", "localhost:11434", "http://localhost:11434"\)\) { $env:OLLAMA_HOST = $c; $result = & "C:\\Users\\klins\\anaconda3\\envs\\nonggof\\python.exe" -c "from app.core.config import get_settings; get_settings.cache_clear\(\); print\(get_settings\(\).OLLAMA_HOST\)" 2>&1 | Out-String; Write-Host \("input={0,-28} output={1}" -f $c, $result.Trim\(\)\) })

PowerShell(& "C:\\Users\\klins\\anaconda3\\envs\\nonggof\\python.exe" -c "import psutil; import pynvml; pynvml.nvmlInit\(\); n = pynvml.nvmlDeviceGetCount\(\); print\(f'psutil OK; nvml: {n} GPU\(s\)'\); h = pynvml.nvmlDeviceGetHandleByIndex\(0\); print\('GPU 0:', pynvml.nvmlDeviceGetName\(h\)\); pynvml.nvmlShutdown\(\)")
